title: microlicia calycina
intro: Microlicia calycina, also known as the yellow flower of the Amazon, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including relief from arthritis, fever reduction, and improved immune function. In traditional herbal medicine, Microlicia calycina is often prepared as a tea or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
